evidence_summary.implemented: HermesGate validation helper binds full record validation and transition evidence enforcement across required fields, optional fields, tenant scope, Matter trace, relationship references, lifecycle status, ownership metadata, and state-transition evidence.
evidence_summary.tests: Model tests and the RP00 control-plane validator execute validateHermesGate, assertHermesGateTransitionEvidence, synthetic fixture validation record checks, missing evidence rejection, skipped transition rejection, terminal transition rejection, and cross-tenant rejection.
evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS verdict and no P0/P1/P2 findings before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains non-delegable; this validation helper can validate reference-only HumanApproval refs but cannot synthesize, approve, replace, or modify human approval decisions.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
This command evidence is read-only validation evidence for RP00.P01.M03.S11 and does not write product state.
ClaudeReviewGate model remains deferred to RP00.P01.M04.S01; this slice only completes the HermesGate validation helper and HermesGate model slice.
